## Problem

What problem does this solve? (e.g. "I'm frustrated when ...")

## Proposal

What you'd like to happen. Be as concrete as you can.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, if any.

## Additional context

Mockups, examples from other apps, or anything else useful.
